channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: IPVanish's Malware Blocking Tech Confirmed as One of the Best | CyberSecurity News
item.description: Independent auditors confirm IPVanish's malware and tracker blocking technology is one of the best on the market, following a successful independent audit confirming its no-log policy.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
